text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after Sakura Chiyono O has a number of
victories under her belt...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O and I are riding a train to the
hot spring vacation we won at the shopping
district's raffle.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: We'll have to transfer trains in seven stations.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Let me know if you want to take a nap. I'll
stay awake for us.
choice_data_list: Let me know if you need a nap, too.
Let me know if you need a nap, too.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Nooo can do.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Today, it's my turn to take care of you.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I even prepared a schedule for us, after all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day before we set off, she gave me a small pamphlet titled Hot Spring Vacation Schedule.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Emblazoned in huge letters on the first page is "A
Giant Thank-You Gift for My Amazing Trainer!"

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Wow, this place looks so luxurious! It must be
pretty renowned.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
And now, please open to page five of your
schedule.
choice_data_list:
Let's see... "This resort boasts famous
Umamusume among its clientele."

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Yes! That's right! I did some research in advance...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But it seems neither of our rooms have karaoke
machines in them...
choice_data_list: You seem so disappointed.
You seem so disappointed.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I mean, it would've been fun to get rowdy and
belt out a few songs after relaxing in the hot
spring!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But since we can't do that, I practiced some magic
tricks instead! Hehe. I'll show you them in our free
time!
choice_data_list: You really prepared for this!
You really prepared for this!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I did! Now then, why don't you head into the hot
springs first?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Sakura Chiyono O pushing me forward, we
head into the building. I can already tell she's
going to be a good host during this trip.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure accepting her hospitality will be the thing
that'll make her happiest, so I decide to do just
that.
choice_data_list: Okay, I'll go first.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Please do!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so I head for the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After finishing my bath, I wait for Sakura Chiyono
O and read the magazine she gave me
beforehand in case I got out before her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems to have considered every possibility
for today. However, I came here for a different
reason.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This hot spring vacation is also a reward for all of
her hard work.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer! You're already out!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...Hm? What's that in your hand?
choice_data_list: Some fruit milk for you.
Some fruit milk for you.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Really? Th-thank you for thinking of me.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But wait! You didn't have to do that. Today's my
day to take care of you!
choice_data_list:
I want today to be a reward for you too,
though.

I want today to be a reward for you too,
though.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Wh-what?! N-no, that's okay...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
You're the one who's always looking after me,
and it's not like I've really done anything that
deserves to be rewarded...
choice_data_list: You've won a lot of races.
You've won a lot of races.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: O-oh... Heh. Yeah... Well...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Those victories were all thanks to you, so... If
anything, I should be the one who's grateful.
choice_data_list: You've been working so hard, though.
You've been working so hard, though.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I told you that was thanks to you.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
After all, you were the one who taught me how to
work so hard.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
...Ehehe. Anyway, what's gotten into you? You're
making me blush!
choice_data_list: I'm proud to be your trainer.
I'm proud to be your trainer.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Wha...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
choice_data_list: Thank you, Chiyono O.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ehe... Ehehe...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Thank you too, Trainer. For everything.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ahhh, gosh! I don't know what to do with myself...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Please don't look at me anymore... It's making me
feel embarrassed...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Siiigh... I wasn't expecting to get praised today... It's completely thrown me off...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I messed up the magic tricks I prepared, and now
we're just lazing around. I hardly even realized
when I finished eating my dinner...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Urgh...
choice_data_list:
What matters is that we're having a good time,
right?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Trainer, you're way too nonchalant about this!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Nooo! Don't look at me yet. You're going to
make me remember our conversation from earlier!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Argh... Sigh... Anyway, um... Like I said, thank you for everything!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After saying that, she covers her face with her
hands and rolls around on the tatami mats in
embarrassment.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Sakura Chiyono O and I have formed
an irreplaceable bond during this time together.
